python_rules.reason: API may depend only on its own implementation namespace and explicit integration adapters.
Worker may depend only on its own implementation namespace and explicit integration adapters.
MCP must stay inside its own namespace or explicit integration adapters; runtime crossings happen over HTTP/contracts.

frontend_rules.reason: Web may import only web-local aliases/relative paths and must not reach into sibling apps or repo packages by file path.

package_purity_rules.reason: Contracts must remain schema-only and free of runtime side effects or environment coupling.
